003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the
006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the
007 * License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025/**
026 * Base for long headers.
027 *
028 * @since 9.2.1
029 */
030@SuppressWarnings({
031   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
032   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
033})
034public class HttpLongHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
035
036   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
037   public static final int LAZY_LONG = 1;
038
039   private final Long value;
040   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
041   private final int lazyMode;
042
043   /**
044    * Creates an {@link HttpLongHeader} by parsing the given wire-format value.
045    *
046    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
047    * @param wireValue Wire value. May be {@code null} or empty.
048    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
049    */
050   public static HttpLongHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
051      return new HttpLongHeader(name, wireValue);
052   }
053
054   /**
055    * Creates an {@link HttpLongHeader} with the given typed value.
056    *
057    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
058    * @param typedValue The long value. May be {@code null}.
059    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
060    */
061   public static HttpLongHeader of(String name, Long typedValue) {
062      return new HttpLongHeader(name, typedValue);
063   }
064
065   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, String wireValue) {
066      super(name, wireValue);
067      this.value = toLong(wireValue);
068      this.lazySupplier = null;
069      this.lazyMode = -1;
070   }
071
072   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, Long typedValue) {
073      super(name, s(typedValue));
074      this.value = typedValue;
075      this.lazySupplier = null;
076      this.lazyMode = -1;
077   }
078
079   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
080      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
081         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
082         : () -> s(((Supplier<Long>) supplier).get()));
083      this.value = null;
084      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
085      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
086   }
087
088   public Optional<Long> asLong() {
089      return o(toLong());
090   }
091
092   @Override
093   public String getValue() {
094      return s(toLong());
095   }
096
097   public Long orElse(Long other) {
098      return asLong().orElse(other);
099   }
100
101   public Long toLong() {
102      if (lazyMode == LAZY_LONG)
103         return ((Supplier<Long>) lazySupplier).get();
104      if (value != null)
105         return value;
106      return toLong(super.getValue());
107   }
108
109   private static Long toLong(String value) {
110      if (value == null)
111         return null;
112      return parseLong(value, () -> iaex("Value ''{0}'' could not be parsed as a long.", value));
113   }
114}
